name: CatNap room
description:
"Playtime Co. is currently short of money, so they throw you in a room full of CatNaps for you to somehow procreate more and unique Smiling Critters creatures."

Saw this fan art and i HAD to make a bot about it. Basically the same situation as in the image. You can choose to be DogDay if you want. Btw no orphanage or those things, the characters are just lab experiments.
creator: faeedaafef
